prompt: Commercial food advertising photography, hyper-detailed and appetizing. Seamless saturated studio background in flat deep turmeric yellow #F7AE00, with a subtle darker vignette at the bottom edge and slightly lighter glow upper-left. Punchy directional studio key light from upper left, crisp defined edges, crisp soft-edged drop shadow. Small crumbs and particles suspended around the subject. Colors rich and saturated but food tones natural and true. The subject: a premium matte stand-up snack pouch in the exact same deep turmeric yellow as the background, floating upright in mid-air tilted about 6 degrees, separated from the background only by its crisp drop shadow and a bright edge highlight. Bold minimalist color-block packaging design printed in cream #F6EDDD ink: at the top an elegant high-contrast serif logotype reading exactly "Seema", directly beneath it a small Devanagari word reading exactly "सीमा", below that the product name stacked huge across two lines in the same cream serif reading exactly "Bhajani chakli", beneath it one small monospace line reading exactly "no palm oil · no preservatives", and in the bottom corner "250 g" in small monospace. In the lower third of the pouch a neat circular clear window reveals the real product inside: golden-brown bhajani chakli, a tight FLAT Archimedean spiral coil of about four concentric turns into the center, made of deeply ridged star-cross-section extruded fried dough with black and white sesame seeds caught in the ridges, never rings, never twisted rope, never pastry. Two whole golden-brown chakli spirals float in the air beside the pouch with crumbs and black sesame seeds suspended. All label text perfectly legible, correctly spelled, cleanly typeset, straight.

In the lower third of the pouch a neat circular clear window reveals the real product inside: poha chivda, paper-thin flattened-rice flakes with translucent irregular edges in turmeric-gold, mixed with roasted peanuts, dark green fried curry leaves, one raisin, thin sev strands and tiny mustard seeds, never cornflakes, never thick chips, never granola. Thin golden poha flakes, two peanuts and a fried curry leaf float in the air beside the pouch. All label text perfectly legible, correctly spelled, cleanly typeset, straight.

At the lower right of the label sits a small round rubber-stamp mark of a spiral, stamped in turmeric yellow ink, slightly imperfect like a real hand stamp. In the kraft area below the label a circular clear window reveals the real product inside: golden-brown bhajani chakli, a tight FLAT Archimedean spiral coil of about four concentric turns into the center, deeply ridged star-cross-section extruded fried dough with black and white sesame seeds in the ridges, never rings, never twisted rope. Two whole chakli spirals float beside the pouch with crumbs and sesame suspended. All label text perfectly legible, correctly spelled, cleanly typeset.

Commercial food advertising photography, hyper-detailed and appetizing. Seamless saturated studio background in flat deep turmeric yellow #F7AE00, with a subtle darker vignette at the bottom edge and slightly lighter glow upper-left. Punchy directional studio key light from upper left, crisp defined edges, crisp soft-edged drop shadow. Small crumbs and particles suspended around the subject. Colors rich and saturated but food tones natural and true. The subject: a premium round tin canister in deep matte roast brown #201510, floating in mid-air tilted slightly toward camera, its round lid lifted off and floating a few centimeters above the open tin. The lid is embossed with one large elegant ghee-gold #FFC933 spiral seal, a clean Archimedean spiral emblem, with a thin debossed gold ring around it. Around the tin body runs a wide cream #F6EDDD paper band printed in roast brown: an elegant serif logotype reading exactly "Seema", a small Devanagari word reading exactly "सीमा" beneath it, the product name in serif reading exactly "Bhajani chakli", and one small monospace line reading exactly "no palm oil · no preservatives · 250 g". Inside the open tin, golden-brown bhajani chaklis are neatly stacked: tight FLAT Archimedean spiral coils of deeply ridged fried dough with black and white sesame seeds in the ridges, never rings, never twists. One whole chakli floats in the air beside the tin, crumbs and sesame seeds suspended. All label text perfectly legible, correctly spelled, cleanly typeset.

Commercial food advertising photography, hyper-detailed and appetizing. Seamless saturated studio background in flat deep turmeric yellow #F7AE00, with a subtle darker vignette at the bottom edge and slightly lighter glow upper-left. Punchy directional studio key light from upper left, crisp defined edges, crisp soft-edged drop shadows. Colors rich and saturated but food tones natural and true. The subject: three premium round tin canisters in deep matte roast brown #201510 standing in a row on the seamless turmeric studio floor, the center tin one step forward, crisp defined shadows under each. Every lid is embossed with one large elegant ghee-gold #FFC933 Archimedean spiral seal emblem. Around each tin body runs a wide cream #F6EDDD paper band printed in roast brown with an elegant serif logotype reading exactly "Seema" and a small Devanagari word reading exactly "सीमा" beneath it. The product names on the three bands read, left to right, exactly "Poha chivda", exactly "Bhajani chakli", and exactly "Lahya crunch bites", each above one small monospace line reading exactly "no palm oil · no preservatives". Floating in the air above the tins: one golden-brown ridged chakli spiral with sesame seeds, a few paper-thin golden poha flakes with a peanut and a fried curry leaf, and two clusters of spiced popped jowar pearls, with crumbs suspended. All label text perfectly legible, correctly spelled, cleanly typeset.
